snippet.title: The Harry Potter Reboot Keeps Getting WORSE...
snippet.description:
The Harry Potter HBO trailer just dropped and I have a lot to say...

From the controversial casting of Snape, to the $100 million per episode budget, to why I think this reboot is going to do more harm than good to one of the most beloved franchises of all time. we are getting into all of it!!

I also compare the reboot to the original Harry Potter films and explain why older movies felt so different visually, and why so many modern shows now look flat, grey, and overly processed. This isn’t just a Harry Potter problem, it’s happening across Hollywood...

If you love movies, acting, or complaining about the state of Hollywood, this one’s for you!

Business inquiries - marina@night.co

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/marinamcbain
TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@marinaswrld 

Thanks for watching :p

snippet.title: Fill Them With Fear: Hero Balloon Coming Soon!
snippet.description:
Pressure is rising, and the Arena is at its breaking point. A new hero arrives soon.

X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale

snippet.title: Eir.M - My Angel (Deep House)_Vers 2
snippet.description:
DEEP AFRO SOUL_Music-Lyrics: Eir.M

🔥Follow me on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6bP2tPAG5vnK0p1G1kYKa7?si=T2sNZ_EqQzOwLGDwWMBtPw

Oh my angel, lost in time...
Through the storm, through the night...
Oh my angel, come back home
I’m still here, all alone

I tell myself you’ll walk back in
Like you forgot something again
I still reach, but nothing's there
Just empty space, and missing air...

I’m stuck reliving what you said
I hear your voice inside my head
I keep the things you left behind
Like they could bring you back in time

Oh my angel, lost in time...
Through the storm,  through the night...
Oh my angel, come back home
I’m still here, all alone

You said “it’s done” like it was small
Like we were never real at all...
You made it easy, I paid the cost
You walked out, I was left with loss
I don’t chase you,  I don’t call
 I still turn when footsteps fall
And for a second, I believe it’s true…
Then realize… I don’t have you 

Oh my angel, 

Now I’m learning 
How to live...
How to forget
How to heal
How to breathe...
Oh my angel, 
Oh angel, 

Angel, 
Angel, 
Maybe you’re fine
Maybe you moved on
Maybe I’m here
just holding on
Oh, my angel...

snippet.title: Куда уходят года… 💔 Песня, от которой сжимается сердце | NE SVYATOY
snippet.description:
Куда уходят года… Почему жизнь проходит так быстро, что мы даже не успеваем это понять?

Эта песня — о времени, которое не остановить.  
О детстве, которое кажется вечностью… и о взрослении, которое проходит за один миг.  
О тех, кого мы потеряли.  
О том, кем мы не стали.  
И о том, что действительно важно.

Если тебе близко это чувство — дослушай до конца.

🎧 Полная версия и другие песни на канале:
👉 (https://youtu.be/Ieh_AI18DUU)

🎵 Слушать на YouTube Music:
👉 https://music.youtube.com/channel/UCVxdsuKUrWs92eyPaNNDJOQ

🎵 Слушать на Spotify:
👉 https://open.spotify.com/artist/35uL9a17iHidEdpYCWJOpT

—

NE SVYATOY — это музыка со смыслом.  
Про жизнь, ошибки, выбор и правду, о которой не принято говорить.

Поддержи канал:
👍 Поставь лайк  
💬 Напиши в комментариях: «отозвалось»  
🔔 Подпишись, если чувствуешь эту музыку

—
